chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3386 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 17.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. It was last taken up on 17.7.2023, which is over two years ago, when learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy this Court about the maintainability of this petition. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. The question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, despite lapse of two years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
